# forRemovedItems

**Type Property**

An option to process deactivation for open-unlinked items at the moment of last close.

## Declaration

```swift
static var forRemovedItems: FSVolume.ItemDeactivationOptions { get }
```

## Declaring deactivation options

- **forPreallocatedItems**: An option to process deactivation for for files with preallocated space.
- **always**: An option to always perform deactivation calls.

items.description: An option to process deactivation for for files with preallocated space.
